name: Center Layout Intent
summary: A primitive layout region-role (#1680 taxonomy): composition-intent = center a child and constrain its measure. Identity is the arrangement, not the CSS — FUI ships one block per role and the mechanism (margin-inline: auto + max-inline-size) is an impl seam. Project-less; per-project styling rides presentational variants + plateau assembler presets.

measure.description: The maximum inline-size the centered child is constrained to — the readable measure. The role's essential knob.

gutters.description: Minimum side padding so the centered child never touches the viewport edge. Absent → no gutter.

intrinsic.description: Whether to center on the child's natural content width (intrinsic) rather than stretching it to the measure. Default false.

center-text.description: Whether to also center the text within the child, not just the box. Default false (box-only centering).

description:
What This Is

Horizontally centers a single child and constrains it to a maximum measure — independent of whether the text inside is centered. The canonical content column.

Composition-intent (the identity)

A primitive layout region-role (layoutTier: region-role), one of the per-role taxonomy ratified in #1680. Its identity is the composition-intent — center a child and constrain its measure — impl-agnostic. FUI ships exactly one block for this role; the CSS mechanism (margin-inline: auto + max-inline-size) is an impl seam, never the role's identity (platform-decisions.md#layout-role-composition-intent).

Dimensions (UX-only)

  • measure: The maximum inline-size the centered child is constrained to — the readable measure. The role's essential knob.
  • gutters: Minimum side padding so the centered child never touches the viewport edge. Absent → no gutter (none · xs · sm · md · lg).
  • intrinsic: Whether to center on the child's natural content width (intrinsic) rather than stretching it to the measure. Default false (true · false).
  • center-text: Whether to also center the text within the child, not just the box. Default false (box-only centering) (true · false).
